creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gian-Simon Purkert from comment #6)

I meant unrelated to the problem at hand (both are iocage and about dependency issues, but the exact issue is something different).

Anyway, thank you for your report and the analysis, I'll look into what's up with the dnspython updates from last month (assuming I can reproduce, which sounds very likely from what you shared).
